title: Fox Corporation's (FOXA) CEO Lachlan Murdoch on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Fox Corporation (NASDAQ:FOXA ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 10, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Joe Dorrego - Chief Investor Relations Officer Lachlan Murdoch - Executive Chairman and Chief Executive Officer John Nallen - Chief Operating Officer Steve Tomsic - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Ben Swinburne - Morgan Stanley Jessica Reif Ehrlich - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Robert Fishman - MoffettNathanson Doug Mitchelson - Credit Suisse Steven Cahall - Wells Fargo Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Fox Corporation Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Fox (FOXA) Q3 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
text: Fox's (FOXA) third-quarter fiscal 2022 results reflect growth in Cable Network Programming and Television segments, supported by increased advertising demand.

title: Fox (FOXA) Misses Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Fox (FOXA) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -4.71% and 1.72%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Fox (FOXA) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Fox's (FOXA) third-quarter fiscal 2022 performance is likely to have benefited from growth in advertiser demand, increasing News network viewership and digital business expansion.

title: Analysts Estimate Fox (FOXA) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: Fox (FOXA) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
